title: Fix Invited User Missing Categories
story: As an invited shared user, I want to see the same categories as the account owner when I log in, so that I can navigate and work with the team's data effectively.
description: Invited users (including those with admin permissions) were seeing empty/missing categories on the categories page when logged in to a shared account. Metrics filtering by category/topic worked correctly elsewhere, but the dedicated categories page was not loading them for invited users.
acceptance_criteria: Invited users can see categories on the categories page
Categories display consistently between shared users and account owners
ux_changes: Categories page now displays correctly for invited/shared users.
middleware_changes: Fixed query or authorization logic to load categories for shared team members, not just the account owner.
implementation_notes: The issue was isolated to the categories page. Metrics filtering by category/topic worked correctly for invited users.
comment_summary: Product confirmed the issue was isolated to the categories page. Developer fixed on development.
